  • News

    Package index

    Core Analysis Functions

    Main spatial analysis workflows

    STclust() stable
    STclust: Spatial clustering (modular implementation)
    STdiff() stable
    STdiff: Differential gene expression analysis for spatial transcriptomics
    STenrich() STenrich_legacy() stable
    STenrich: Test for spatial enrichment of gene expression sets
    STgradient() stable
    STgradient: Tests of gene expression spatial gradients
    SThet() stable
    SThet: Computes global spatial autocorrelation statistics on gene expression
    STplot() stable
    STplot: Plots of gene expression, cluster memberships, and metadata in spatial context

    Differential Expression (STdiff)

    Spatial and non-spatial differential expression testing

    STdiff_run_nonspatial()
    STdiff_run_nonspatial: Run non-spatial differential expression tests
    STdiff_run_spatial()
    STdiff_run_spatial: Run spatial differential expression analysis
    STdiff_fit_ttest()
    STdiff_fit_ttest: Fit non-spatial t-tests
    STdiff_fit_wilcoxon()
    STdiff_fit_wilcoxon: Fit non-spatial Wilcoxon tests
    STdiff_fit_mm()
    STdiff_fit_mm: Fit non-spatial mixed models
    STdiff_fit_spatial_models()
    STdiff_fit_spatial_models: Fit spaMM spatial models with Matern covariance
    STdiff_adjust_pvalues()
    STdiff_adjust_pvalues: Adjust p-values using multiple testing correction
    STdiff_add_metadata()
    STdiff_add_metadata: Add cluster and sample metadata to results
    STdiff_compile_results()
    STdiff_compile_results: Compile non-spatial and spatial results
    STdiff_format_output()
    STdiff_format_output: Format results for user consumption
    STdiff_extract_spatial_pvalues()
    STdiff_extract_spatial_pvalues: Extract spatial p-values from model results
    STdiff_check_convergence()
    STdiff_check_convergence: Check model convergence and extract summary statistics
    STdiff_volcano()
    STdiff_volcano: Generates volcano plots from STdiff results

    Heterogeneity Analysis (SThet)

    Spatial heterogeneity statistics (Moran’s I, Geary’s C)

    SThet() stable
    SThet: Computes global spatial autocorrelation statistics on gene expression
    SThet_invdist_test()
    SThet_invdist_test: Computes spatial autocorrelation with statistical tests
    compare_SThet()
    compare_SThet: Compares spatial autocorrelation statistics across samples

    Gradient Analysis (STgradient)

    Spatial gradient correlation analysis

    STgradient() stable
    STgradient: Tests of gene expression spatial gradients

    Enrichment Analysis (STenrich)

    Gene set enrichment analysis with spatial permutation

    STenrich() STenrich_legacy() stable
    STenrich: Test for spatial enrichment of gene expression sets

    Clustering (STclust)

    Spatial clustering with hierarchical methods

    STclust() stable
    STclust: Spatial clustering (modular implementation)
    get_hier_clusters_dtc()
    get_hier_clusters_dtc: Hierarchical clustering with DynamicTreeCut
    get_hier_clusters_ks()
    get_hier_clusters_ks: Hierarchical clustering with fixed k values

    Data Import & Management

    Create and manage STlist objects

    STlist() stable
    STlist: Creation of STlist objects for spatial transcriptomics analysis
    summarize_STlist()
    summarize_STlist: Generates a data frame with summary statistics
    spatial_metadata()
    spatial_metadata: Prints the names of the available spot/cell annotations
    filter_data()
    filter_data: Filters cells/spots, genes, or samples
    transform_data()
    transform_data: Transformation of spatial transcriptomics data
    get_gene_meta()
    get_gene_meta: Extract gene-level metadata and statistics

    Visualization

    Plotting and visualization functions

    STplot() stable
    STplot: Plots of gene expression, cluster memberships, and metadata in spatial context
    STplot_interpolation()
    STplot_interpolation: Visualize gene expression surfaces
    plot_counts()
    plot_counts: Generates plots for the distribution of counts
    plot_image()
    plot_image: Generate a ggplot object of the tissue image
    distribution_plots()
    per_unit_counts: Generates distribution plots of spot/cell meta data or gene expression
    pseudobulk_dim_plot()
    pseudobulk_dim_plot: Plot PCA of pseudobulk samples
    pseudobulk_heatmap()
    pseudobulk_heatmap: Heatmap of pseudobulk samples
    pseudobulk_samples()
    pseudobulk_samples: Aggregates counts into "pseudo bulk" samples
    gene_interpolation()
    gene_interpolation: Spatial interpolation of gene expression

    Legacy Functions

    Original implementations for reproducibility

    STList_legacy() superseded
    STlist (Legacy): Creation of STlist objects for spatial transcriptomics analysis
    STclust_legacy() superseded
    STclust: Detect clusters of spots/cells (legacy)
    STdiff_legacy() superseded
    STdiff: Differential gene expression analysis for spatial transcriptomics data (legacy)
    STenrich() STenrich_legacy() stable
    STenrich: Test for spatial enrichment of gene expression sets
    STgradient_legacy() superseded
    STgradient_legacy: Tests of gene expression spatial gradients (legacy)
    SThet_legacy() superseded
    SThet_legacy: Computes global spatial autocorrelation statistics on gene expression (legacy)

    Seurat Integration

    Convert between STlist and Seurat objects

    as.Seurat.STlist() stable
    Convert STlist to Seurat Object
    as.STlist.Seurat() stable
    Convert Seurat Object to STlist
    spatialGE_from_seurat() stable
    Run spatialGE analysis on Seurat object
    add_spatialGE_to_seurat() stable
    Add spatialGE results to Seurat object
    spatialGE_to_seurat_genesets() stable
    Create Seurat-compatible gene sets from spatialGE results

    Helper Functions

    Utility functions for spatial analysis

    calculate_dist_matrices()
    calculate_dist_matrices: Calculate and scale distance matrices
    calculate_weighted_dist()
    calculate_weighted_dist: Calculate weighted distance matrices
    load_images()
    load_images: Place tissue images within STlist
    tissue_names()
    tissue_names: Prints the names of the tissue samples in the STlist
    can_convert_to_STlist()
    Check if object can be converted to STlist

    On this page

    Developed by Oscar Ospina, Alex Soupir, Brooke Fridley.
